argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const res = await fetch('/mweb/v1/workspace/list?aid=513695&web_version=7.5.0&da_version=3.3.12', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({}) }).then(r => r.json()); if (res.ret === '1014' || res.ret === 1014) { return [{ workspace_id: '', name: 'Not logged in', is_pinned: '', updated_at: '' }]; } if (res.ret !== '0' && res.ret !== 0) { return [{ workspace_id: '', name: 'workspace/list failed: ret=' + res.ret, is_pinned: '', updated_at: '' }]; } return (res.data?.workspaces || []).map(ws => ({ workspace_id: String(ws.workspace_id), name: ws.name || '', is_pinned: ws.is_pinned ? 'yes' : 'no', updated_at: ws.update_time ? new Date(ws.update_time).toLocaleString('zh-CN') : '' })); }

description: 即梦AI 查看所有工作区（会话窗口）
name: Workspaces
